violations.text: Areas of the kitchen and bar were observed to be lacking coving at the floor to wall juncture. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

The painted ceiling to the kitchen area was observed in need of refinishing/repair (taped seams observable/exposed). Physical facilities of are to be maintained in good repair. Proper finishes for indoor areas was discussed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

The bar hand sink was observed to be lacking paper towels for drying hands after washing. Paper towels were supplied at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the kitchen and bar 3-bay sinks was less than 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Sanitizer solution was adjusted to proper range at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

Several food items prepared on site were observed held beyond 7 days from the date of preparation. Food items were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

Spray bottle used for sanitizer solution was observed not marked with the common name of the chemical contained. Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

At the time of inspection, raw chicken was observed held in reduced oxygen packaged bags in the freezer unit. Per the PIC, the chicken is portioned and Reduced Oxygen Packaged on site. Due to lack of a HACCP Plan and prior approval from RIDOH CFP, establishment is to discontinue the use of reduced oxygen procedures. Per the PIC, will switch to use of zip-top bags. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

Areas of the kitchen and bar were observed to be lacking coving at the floor to wall juncture. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

The painted ceiling to the kitchen area was observed in need of refinishing/repair (taped seams observable/exposed). Physical facilities of are to be maintained in good repair. Proper finishes for indoor areas was discussed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

The walls in the back kitchen/food prep area are constructed of painted cement. This material is not smooth or easily cleanable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in a reach in refrigeration unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0-25 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC took dish machine out of service and will call a technician for repairs. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC turned off machine and disposed of ice at time of inspection. PIC to clean and sanitize machine prior to reuse. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish washing machine in the back ware-washing area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The two dish washing machines and the food prep sink were lacking air gaps. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The condensate from bar refrigeration unit is draining into a pan thats leaking. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the bar area (under three bay sink observed to have gap with exposed wood) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The walls in the back kitchen/food prep area are constructed of painted cement. This material is not smooth or easily cleanable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
